//: skill-runs substrate config: skillRuns.baseDir (DL-001/C-003), skillRuns.retentionDays (DL-005), skillRuns.copyTranscript (DL-030: copy native subagent transcript into the run dir on SubagentStop; default true is behavior-preserving — set false to rely solely on native transcripts via cleanupPeriodDays, a NATIVE-FIRST/DL-015 opt-out), CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS (DL-009), CLAUDE_SKILL_DEBUG_TEAMS=1 (DL-029: opt-in, default off — append raw Teams-hook payloads to skill-runs-debug/team-payloads.jsonl for field verification; bounded by a 50 MB cap). Spawn restriction (DL-015, M-008b): Python dispatch-prose guards removed; spawn surface now constrained by native primitives only — Agent(type) allowlists in each orchestrator/lead definition's tools field; permissions.deny:["Agent(<name>)"] here for disabled agents; headless: set CLAUDE_AGENT_SDK_DISABLE_BUILTIN_AGENTS=1.

env.//CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS: Set to '1' to enable Agent Teams mode (experimental). When unset or empty, skills degrade gracefully: Workflow tool + Agent-tool subagents are used instead. Resume semantics are identical in both modes (DL-009). The active key is intentionally omitted: select_orchestration_mode() treats empty-string identically to absent, so committing an empty value only misrepresented the live runtime mode (DL-T1-04).
